execution_policy: one explicit case per process after independent stage review seal; no retries; external parallelism only

machine_enforced_sequence.remaining_17_gate: passing RAC result seal plus compare_rac_v19 candidate plus independent xhigh RAC reproduction review seal

matrix_analysis_contract: steady 60-600 s; every case result seal must match directory case_id and current ready/stage seals; timewise load interaction and pressure curvature; descriptive soil center-axis and 3x3 model residuals
purpose: new 600 s paper-condition matrix after spud-soil contact-kinematics repair
source_integrity_contract: prepare scans every AQWA/cutter CSV for rows, t0, t1, fixed-dt continuity and finite numeric values; both cutter histories also require t600=t0 continuity for every load field within sealed atol+rtol
storage_policy: gzip full-resolution scalar table plus 1 s retained heavy result; accepted-corrector trace and per-case result seal
